summary.intent: Research what the ART (Automated Release Tooling) team does for OpenShift.
summary.outcome: Used OpenShift helpdesk research tool and modified source resolver files in the doozer codebase, though the transcript doesn't show the research findings.

repo: The codebase includes doozer, which appears to be related to OpenShift ART team tooling
Source resolution logic exists in doozerlib/source_resolver.py with corresponding tests
workflow: OpenShift-specific research can be conducted using mcp__ai-openshift-helpdesk__research tool
